heroHeadline:
US Bombs Kharg Island;
Pentagon Vows to 'Ramp Up'
heroSubtitle: Day 15: US strikes Kharg Island — Iran's main oil export terminal (90% of exports). Pentagon vows to 'ramp up' campaign. IDF struck Shiraz (missile production), Ahvaz (IRGC Ground Forces HQ), and Tehran air defense (Mar 13). Iran Health Ministry: 1,444+ killed, 18,551+ injured. Lebanon: 773+ killed, 800K displaced. US KIA: 13. Hormuz near-zero traffic. Brent crude above $100/bbl despite IEA's record 400M barrel reserve release.
footerNote: Data compiled from 100+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 14, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
